name: River Endurance
description: Cold water and heavy stones have taught your body how to continue.

name: Farmhand Strength
description: Labor has made your strength plain, practical, and stubborn.

name: Village Fist Forms
description: A plain mortal boxing set built for balance, guard, and honest bruises.

name: Staff Basics
description: You know how to keep distance with a staff and make simple strikes land.

name: Sparring Instinct
description: Practice against moving people has taught you not to freeze when struck.

name: Corrected Stance
description: A teacher has corrected the small mistakes that wasted force and exposed your ribs.

name: Skin Tempering
description: Cold, impact, and repetition have made pain less persuasive.

name: Sinew Tempering
description: Your strength is beginning to settle into tendons instead of only muscles.

name: Careful Eye
description: You notice small details before they become large problems.

name: Calm Breath
description: You can slow fear into something almost useful.

name: Plain Speech
description: You speak like a mortal among mortals, which can be rarer than talent.

name: Campcraft
description: You know how to keep warm, dry, fed, and moving on a bad road.

name: Herb Recognition
description: You can tell useful leaves from pretty poison and wasted effort.

name: Heat Control
description: You know when a brew needs patience and when the fire should bite.

name: Crude Elixir Refining
description: You can make mortal tools imitate the outer edge of pill refining.

name: Impurity Awareness
description: Your nose and instincts warn you when medicine will leave a debt.

name: Herbalist Apprentice
description: A mortal herbalist trusts you with preparation work that can help or harm a body.

name: Bellows Rhythm
description: You can feed a forge without letting the fire rule you.

name: Iron Sense
description: Flaws in plain metal catch your eye before they break under strain.

name: Tool Repair
description: You can keep knives, staffs, buckles, and road gear alive another day.

name: Hammer Discipline
description: Repeated blows teach strength to become accurate.

name: Forge Apprentice
description: Blacksmith Guo has taught you how honest repairs keep gear and bones from failing.

name: Untrained Circulation
description: You can stir qi by instinct, though instinct is not the same as safety.

name: Foundation Control
description: You are beginning to value stability as much as speed.

name: Shrine Breathing
description: A shrine keeper's counting method steadies breath before it becomes true cultivation.

name: Azure Cloud Breathing Roots
description: The sect method has begun to settle into your body instead of only your memory.
